payload.description: Beautify stations quickly and efficiently to provide our customers with a brighter, cleaner and better station environment. Key elements: Improve station building and restroom conditions, Repair damaged shelter shed components, Upgrade to LED lighting, Upgrade weathered station signage, Enhance cleaning initiatives
2025 Spruced Up Stations for the LIRR Station Spruce-Up Program
